signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turn cold; city vaults tighten.
signals.questPulse: Market dives, shadow ops seek hidden gains.
signals.worldFeed: Asset chains fracture, trust erodes in neon haze.
signals.clueEvent: Vault logs reveal sudden drop in cryptonode sync.

signals.npcLine: RAVE spikes; underground rave techruns spike alerts.
signals.questPulse: Scramble cryptic nodes linked to AAVE and RAVE spikes.
signals.worldFeed: Ghost signals pulse from abandoned data nets.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter glitched near forgotten subnet hubs.

signals.npcLine: WOJAK codes flicker; memes mutate into danger signs.
signals.questPulse: Decode cryptic memestream spikes for hidden threats.
signals.worldFeed: Memes gone viral, harboring deeper viral traces.
signals.clueEvent: Flash crashes sync with memestream anomalies.

signals.npcLine: PENGU packs mobilize; icy fronts threaten digital borders.
signals.questPulse: Intercept PENGU payloads before market chills spread.
signals.worldFeed: Cold chain hacks target cryptobanks' weak nodes.
signals.clueEvent: Frost-bitten data trails point to rogue actors.

signals.npcLine: ZRO whispers hint at zero-sum plays beneath neon fog.
signals.questPulse: Track ZRO token shadows in the fading market glow.
signals.worldFeed: Silent exchanges bubble with unspoken tension.
signals.clueEvent: Zero-value spikes forecast cryptic market recalibrations.
